race.comment: TOO HOT TO TORQUE (6) covered a stack of ground from the wide gate first-up, when peaked on the run to finish second over 1015m at this track. Stalks the good tempo today and gets his chance. ALLEZE (4) is a talented filly undefeated in two starts. Had plenty up the sleeve with a comfortable first-up victory over 1005m at Grafton. Rates highly with the claim and can overcome the sticky barrier. ARCHIE MAXIMUS (7) scored a deserved Maiden win third-up over the 1180m at Grafton. Likely to go back from the gate and be ridden for luck. Stays in the mix. DIAMONDSAREMIO (10) on the quick back-up today after disappointing at her last two starts. Drops further in weight with Spokes' claim and gets one more chance.
